item.title: Loyal Equipments Gains 7.70%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Rebound
item.description: Loyal Equipments Ltd experienced a volatile week, ultimately gaining 7.70% from Rs.164.30 to Rs.176.95, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.29% over the same period. The stock rebounded strongly after hitting a 52-week low on 30 March 2026, driven by a combination of market recovery and technical repositioning amid a downgrade to a Strong Sell rating by MarketsMOJO. Time: Apr 05 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Galaxy Surfactants Gains 3.56%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Move
item.description: Galaxy Surfactants Ltd experienced a volatile week, ultimately gaining 3.56% to close at Rs.1,653.35 on 2 April 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.29% over the same period. The stock rebounded strongly after hitting a 52-week low on 30 March, driven by a significant intraday surge on 1 April amid broader market recovery and sector strength. Time: Apr 05 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Zodiac Clothing Gains 4.99% Despite All-Time Low: 4 Key Factors Driving the Move
item.description: Zodiac Clothing Company Ltd’s stock exhibited notable volatility this week, closing with a 4.99% gain despite a turbulent start marked by a fresh 52-week and all-time low of Rs.59.2 on 30 March 2026. The stock outperformed the Sensex, which declined by 0.29% over the same period, reflecting a week of sharp reversals and heightened trading activity amid challenging sectoral and financial conditions. Time: Apr 05 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Ltd Gains 6.30%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Move
item.description: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Ltd (MTNL) closed the week ending 3 April 2026 with a 6.30% gain, rising from Rs.23.01 to Rs.24.46, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.29% over the same period. The stock experienced significant volatility, hitting a 52-week low on 30 March before staging a strong rebound on 1 April. This review analyses the key events and market dynamics that shaped MTNL’s price action during the week. Time: Apr 05 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Bhagiradha Chemicals Gains 4.44%: 4 Key Events Shaping the Week
item.description: Bhagiradha Chemicals & Industries Ltd closed the week with a 4.44% gain, rising from Rs.189.05 on 27 March 2026 to Rs.197.45 on 2 April 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.29% over the same period. The week was marked by significant volatility, including a sharp fall to a 52-week low followed by a strong recovery driven by a notable gap up and intraday surge. These price movements were influenced by a combination of technical factors, sectoral trends, and market sentiment shifts. Time: Apr 05 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Asian Hotels (East) Ltd Gains 6.02%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Move
item.description: Asian Hotels (East) Ltd delivered a notable weekly gain of 6.02%, closing at Rs.150.65 on 2 April 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.29% over the same period. The stock’s upward momentum was driven by a significant technical development—the formation of a Golden Cross—and a subsequent upgrade in its investment rating from 'Strong Sell' to 'Sell' by MarketsMOJO. Despite persistent fundamental challenges, these technical improvements have shifted market sentiment, marking a cautiously optimistic phase for the micro-cap hotel and resorts company. Time: Apr 05 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: JTL Industries Gains 8.56%: Key Market Moves and Technical Signals This Week
item.description: JTL Industries Ltd delivered a notable weekly gain of 8.56%, closing at Rs.49.83 on 2 April 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.29% over the same period. The week was marked by a sharp rebound following a 52-week low, a significant gap up opening, and renewed intraday strength, reflecting a volatile but ultimately positive shift in the stock’s trajectory amid a cautious broader market environment. Time: Apr 05 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Hindusthan Urban Infrastructure Ltd Gains 16.97%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Surge
item.description: Hindusthan Urban Infrastructure Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 16.97% from Rs.467.30 to Rs.546.60 between 30 March and 2 April 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.29% over the same period. The stock’s rally was marked by a new 52-week high, technical upgrades, and volatile trading amid weak fundamental signals. Time: Apr 05 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Axis Bank Ltd. Declines 0.58%: 7 Key Factors Shaping This Week’s Volatility
item.description: Axis Bank Ltd. closed the week ending 2 April 2026 with a marginal decline of 0.58%, slightly underperforming the Sensex which fell 0.29%. The week was marked by volatile trading sessions, a notable intraday high on 1 April, and persistent bearish sentiment reflected in heavy put option activity. Despite intermittent rebounds, the stock faced pressure from broader market weakness and sectoral headwinds, culminating in a cautious outlook for investors. Time: Apr 05 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Moschip Technologies Gains 4.75%: Key Market Moves and Technical Signals This Week
item.description: Moschip Technologies Ltd closed the week ending 3 April 2026 with a notable gain of 4.75%, rising from Rs.159.00 to Rs.166.55, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.29% over the same period. The stock’s recovery was led by a strong gap up and intraday surge on 1 April, reversing earlier losses and signalling renewed buying interest despite prevailing bearish technical indicators and a recent downgrade in its Mojo Grade. Time: Apr 05 2026 05:00 PM IST
